title: MetricDatum
description: Encapsulates the information sent to either create a metric or add new values to be aggregated into an existing metric.

Dimensions.description: The dimensions associated with the metric.

Timestamp.description: The time the metric data was received, expressed as the number of milliseconds since Jan 1, 1970 00:00:00 UTC.

Value.description: The value for the metric. Although the parameter accepts numbers of type Double, CloudWatch rejects values that are either too small or too large.

Values.description: Array of numbers representing the values for the metric during the period.

Counts.description: Array of numbers that is used along with the Values array.

StorageResolution.description: Valid values are 1 and 60. Setting this to 1 specifies this metric as a high-resolution metric.
